name: Upbound
description: Upbound — Managed Crossplane control plane platform for composing cloud infrastructure via Kubernetes-style APIs.

seo.title: Upbound — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Upbound: Upbound — Managed Crossplane control plane platform for composing cloud infrastructure via Kubernetes-style APIs.

when_to_use: Managed Crossplane for composing cloud infrastructure via K8s API
Platform engineering teams building internal cloud platforms
IaC abstraction layer for self-service cloud provisioning
Multi-cloud resource management via Kubernetes CRDs
Replacing Terraform with Crossplane-based declarative infra

pros: Managed Crossplane control planes as a service
cons: Opinionated around Kubernetes for all infra
Enterprise pricing, unclear for small teams
Overkill if Terraform already works for you
review.verdict: The canonical way to run Crossplane in production, but only worth it if you're building an internal platform.
review.best_for: Platform teams building internal developer platforms with Crossplane
review.not_for: Small teams happy with Terraform or Pulumi for their infra
